title: Cryptoolsec
description: Secure Python CLI & GUI tool for efficient file/stream encryption & decryption (AES-256-GCM, streaming I/O). Supports passwords (Argon2id+Salt) or key files. Built for security and automation.

title: EITIN
description: PowerShell script for automated IT inventory. Collects detailed system hardware, software, network, and security information, running with elevated privileges to ensure data completeness.

title: MDex
description: Python script to download manga chapters from MangaDex API and automatically create PDFs. Supports multiple languages, interactive/CLI modes, and flexible selection.

title: Control-Aegis
description: PowerShell module for managing port blocks/exceptions (Firewall) and domains (Hosts file) on Windows using a config.json file, with logging and rollback.

title: WinNetDiag
description: Interactive PowerShell tool for Windows network diagnostics/repair. Menu includes progressive checks/fixes (Light to Deep Reset option), targeted analysis, connection/service checks, and detailed logs. For IT support.

title: WinOpti
description: WinOpti is an optimization script for Windows that enhances system performance by cleaning temporary files, clearing browser caches, removing unnecessary logs, and terminating resource-hogging processes, providing a faster and more efficient experience.

title: SysStorageCheck
description: PowerShell script for system storage analysis, disk monitoring, large file detection, and integrity verification with hash, generating reports for IT infrastructure optimization.

title: Auto-Clicker
description: A simple AutoHotkey script to automate mouse clicks for repetitive tasks. Ideal for games or automation processes that require continuous clicking.
